steps.title: Substitute the given input
steps.content:
Use $x=0$ in $h(x)=x+b$. Since the input term is $0$, the output equals the constant term:
$$h(0)=0+b=b$$

steps.title: Use the function value
steps.content:
The problem states that $h(0)=31$. Since $h(0)=b$, the constant must have the same value:
$$b=31$$The answer is 31.
